notes:
v0.1.3: Seamless Streaming & UI Scaling Update
- Gapless Playback: Intelligent 30s background prefetching for web streams
- Seamless Handover: Smooth track transitions without loading screens
- Proportional UI Scaling: Control bar now scales perfectly to any window size
- Detailed Error Reporting: Transparent feedback for failed updates
- Localized History: Multi-language support for the in-app Changelog
- Optimized Cursor Management for better focus
